name: Late Checkouts
query: SELECT r.confirmation_number AS 'Confirmation:Data:130', rt.code AS 'Room Type:Data:120', r.check_in AS 'Check In:Date:100', r.check_out AS 'Check Out:Date:100', DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), r.check_out) AS 'Days Overdue:Int:110', r.rooms_requested AS 'Rooms:Int:80', (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(rg.guest_name SEPARATOR ', ') FROM `tabReservation Guest` rg WHERE rg.parent = r.name) AS 'Guests:Data:220', (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(rg.phone SEPARATOR ', ') FROM `tabReservation Guest` rg WHERE rg.parent = r.name AND rg.phone IS NOT NULL AND rg.phone != '') AS 'Phone:Data:150' FROM `tabReservation` r JOIN `tabRoom Type` rt ON rt.name = r.room_type WHERE r.status = 'checked_in' AND r.check_out < CURDATE() ORDER BY r.check_out ASC
